actions.description: Creates a new channel within a team.
actions.name: createChannel

properties.description: The OData context URL that indicates the metadata for the response.
properties.name: @odata.context

properties.description: The date and time when the channel was created.
properties.name: createdDateTime

properties.description: Name of the channel that will appear to the user in Microsoft Teams.
properties.name: displayName

properties.description: Indicates whether the channel is marked as favorite by default.
properties.name: isFavoriteByDefault

properties.description: The email address of the channel if it is enabled to receive emails.
properties.name: email

properties.description: URL to access the channel in a web browser.
properties.name: webUrl

properties.description: The type of channel membership, e.g., standard or private.
properties.name: membershipType

properties.description: Indicates whether the channel is archived.
properties.name: isArchived
